Text: BATTERY PACK UPPER CASE : Removal and Installation
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: DANGER:
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: Since hybrid vehicles and electric vehicles contain a high voltage battery, there is the risk of
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: electric shock, electric leakage, or similar accidents if the high voltage component and vehicle are
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: handled incorrectly. Be sure to follow the correct work procedures when performing inspection and
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: maintenance.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: WARNING:
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: • Be sure to remove the service plug in order to shut off the high voltage circuits before performing
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: inspection or maintenance of high voltage system harnesses and parts.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: • Be sure to put the removed service plug in pocket and carry it or store it in a tool box or other con-
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: tainer so that another person does not accidentally connect it while work is in progress.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: • Be sure to put on insulating protective gear before beginning work on the high voltage system.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: • Clearly identify the persons responsible for high voltage work and ensure that other persons do not
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: touch the vehicle. When not working, cover high voltage components with an anti-static cover sheet
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: or similar item to prevent contact with other persons.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: • Refer to
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: EVB-6, "High Voltage Precautions"
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: • If the battery pack is to be disassembled, be sure to remove the Li-ion battery controller for prevent-
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: ing electric shock, fire, and damage to parts.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: CAUTION:
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: There is the possibility of a malfunction occurring if the vehicle is changed to READY status while the
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: service plug is removed. Therefore do not change the vehicle to READY status unless instructed to do
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: so in the Service Manual.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation

Text: ENVIRONMENT FOR LI-ION BATTERY DISASSEMBLY WORK
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: Must be an indoor environment.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: • The environment must utilize a shutter or other means to shut out the outside environment and prevent
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: rain, snow, dust, or other substances from entering.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: • The environment must not cause the intrusion of sweat during work, or cause condensation to occur
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: due to high temperature or humidity.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: Metal powder, grease, and other foreign substances must not enter.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: • The indoor environment must also prevent metal powder, grease, and other foreign substances from
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: entering due to maintenance performed on other vehicles and other sources during disassembly work.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: • If there is a risk of the above substances entering, take appropriate countermeasures, such as use of a
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: vinyl curtain or an equivalent to shut out the outside environment.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: The floor must be dry.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: • The floor must not be wet as a result of factors such as vehicle entry during rain or snow.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: Work space
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: • The work space must be approximately the size of one entire vehicle.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: • Take appropriate countermeasures so that persons other than the operator do not enter the work space,
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: such as by placing signs indicating that disassembly work is in progress.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: Standard fire fighting equipment
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: • Always place a standard fire fighting equipment in the disassembly work area.
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: • Depending on type of fire (vehicle or battery) use standard fire fighting equipment (water or extin-
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work

Text: guisher).
Header_3: battery pack upper case  removal and installation
Header_4: environment for li-ion battery disassembly work
